## Type
<!-- Check one that matches your branch prefix -->
- [ ] `feat` — New feature (`feature/*`)
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix (`fix/*`)
- [ ] `improve` — Skill/format improvement (`improve/*`)
- [ ] `chore` — Config, tooling, housekeeping (`chore/*`)
- [ ] `release` — Version release (`release/*`)
- [ ] `hotfix` — Urgent production fix (`hotfix/*`)

## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do and why? -->

-
-

## Breaking Changes
- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Yes — describe impact:

## Principle Checklist
<!-- Required for SKILL.md changes. Skip for pure chore/config changes. -->
- [ ] No technology-specific content (no language, framework, tool, command, or file path)
- [ ] Describes WHAT to achieve, not HOW to implement
- [ ] Single responsibility — one skill, one concern
- [ ] Format: Markdown headings + XML semantic tags only (`<constraints>`, `<criteria>`, `<instruction>`)
- [ ] Token efficient — no redundant text, no duplication with README

## Research Basis
<!-- Required only for structural or language format changes to SKILL.md files -->

## Testing
- [ ] Verified locally
- [ ] No new untested logic (or tests added)

Closes #
